title: thelypteris woitapensis
intro: Thelypteris woitapensis, also known as the Philippine maiden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris woitapensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to improve digestion and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris woitapensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional remedies and supplements, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
